Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Maryann Dresner, Esq., for Plaintiff and Moving party: Jerry Ross Barrish
Akram Chaudhry; Fiaz Javed: defendants and opposing party appeared in Propria Persona

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Jerry Barrish's Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories is granted. Defendants are ordered to respond to Form Interrogatory Numbers 2 and 15.1 within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Mtn For Stay And Protective Order With Respect To Pltf'S Req. For Admission And Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Fiaz Javed, defendant and moving party appeared in Propria Persona
Maryann Dresner, Esq., for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Jerry Ross Barrish

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED with modification: Defendant Fiaz Javed's Motion For Stay And Protective Order With Respect To Plaintiff's Request For Admission And Interrogatories is denied. The objections that are the subject of the motion do not have merit and would not be properly made. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order.

MODIFICATION:
- TO REQUIRE RESPONSES BY 11/21/08.
COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
